title: Add a Data List to a Lightning Page

blocks.content: An Executable Data List can be added to a Lightning page to display the results of a configured Data List.
For example, a Data List configured to return open Opportunities for the current Account can be placed on the Account record page.

children.content: Open the record page where you want to add the component.
In the Lightning Components panel, locate Executable Data List under Custom – Managed.
Drag the component onto the page.
Configure the component in the component properties panel.
